## Markdown markup @SEC-003

### REQUIREMENT: Markdown support @SDOC-SRS-202

> STATUS: Active

> RATIONALE: Markdown is the most popular markup language among programmers. Compared to the StrictDoc native SDoc markup, Markdown is much more familiar to developers, which lowers the entry barrier for writing formal requirements with StrictDoc or other tools. It is also used extensively by AI tools.

StrictDoc shall support Markdown markup.
